video_description.info: Describe the video to make it accessible for customers using screen readers.
video_description.label: Video alt text

custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.
custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid

header_currency_selector.info: To add a currency, go to your [currency settings.](/admin/settings/currencies)

header_language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

header_follow_on_shop.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

header_show_social.info: To display your social media accounts, link them in your [theme settings](/editor?context=theme&category=social%20media).

image_rollover.info: Optional - Rollover image should be the same size as the image
image_rollover.label: Image rollover

show_rating.info: To display a rating, add a product rating app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/os20/themes-by-shopify/dawn/page-types#product-grid-show-product-rating)
show_rating.label: Show rating

icons_enable.info: Show the menu, search, account and cart icons in the header
icons_enable.label: Enable icons

mega_menu.info: Display nested menu links in columns
mega_menu.label: Enable mega menu style

mega_menu_images.label: Show mega menu images
mega_menu_images.info: Display the featured image for each top-level nested menu link

scroll_lock.info: When enabled, the header will always be shown on screen while scrolling.
scroll_lock.label: Enable sticky header

header_currency_selector.info: To add a currency, go to your [currency settings.](/admin/settings/currencies)

header_language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

scroll_lock.info: When enabled, the top bar will always be shown on screen while scrolling.
scroll_lock.label: Enable sticky top bar

custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.
custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid

background_image.info: Show when Google Maps is not loaded.
background_image.label: Background image

map_address.info: Google Maps will find the exact location
map_address.label: Map address

add_to_cart_text.info: Optional. Replace the default text with an alternate like Pre-Order.
add_to_cart_text.label: Add to cart text

show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)
show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift cards
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Allows buyers to send gift cards on a scheduled date along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

sold_out_text.info: Optional. Replace the default text with an alternate like Backorder or Coming Soon.
sold_out_text.label: Sold out text

paragraph.content: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.
custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid

low_stock_threshold.label: Low stock threshold
low_stock_threshold.info: Products with inventory at or below this level will show as low stock

selling_fast_threshold.label: Selling fast threshold
selling_fast_threshold.info: Products with inventory at or below this level will show as selling fast

show_in_stock_count.label: Show inventory count when in stock

show_selling_fast_count.label: Show inventory count when selling fast

show_low_stock_count.label: Show inventory count when low stock

show_out_of_stock_count.label: Show inventory count when out of stock

enable_ping_animation.label: Enable pulse animation
enable_ping_animation.info: Shows animated pulse for in stock, selling fast, and low stock statuses

paragraph.content: Show related products like different colors or styles. Products can be manually selected or populated from a product metafield.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: Example: Color, Style, Material, Available in

products.label: Sibling Products
products.info: Select products manually or connect to a product list metafield

tabs_auto_headings.info: Automatically create tabs from the headings added to the product description.
tabs_auto_headings.label: Description headings to tabs

paragraph.content: To display a rating, add a product rating app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/os20/themes-by-shopify/dawn/sections#featured-collection-show-product-rating)

paragraph_color_swatches.content: Show swatches for Color product options when using the button style. [Learn more](https://help.stylehatch.com/article/335-product-color-swatches)

show_featured_image.label: Show featured product image on load
show_featured_image.info: Display the featured product media instead of the first selected variant media

visitor_limit.info: Logged in customers will not see this bar.
visitor_limit.label: Only show for visitors

visitor_limit.info: Logged in customers will not see this bar.
visitor_limit.label: Only show for visitors

scroll_lock.info: When enabled, the promos will always be shown on screen while scrolling.
scroll_lock.label: Enable sticky promos

image.info: Displayed while video is loading and in browsers that do not support autoplay video. Recommended size: 2000x800px
image.label: Image

mobile_image.info: Displayed while video is loading and in browsers that do not support autoplay video. Recommended size: 1200x1200px
mobile_image.label: Mobile image

video.label: Video
video.info: Upload an MP4 video file. When uploaded this will be used instead of the external video URL.

cover_image.info: Displayed while video is loading. Recommended size: 1600x900px
cover_image.label: Cover image

video_description.info: Describe the video to make it accessible for customers using screen readers.
video_description.label: Video alt text

image.info: Displayed while video is loading. Recommended size: 2000x800px
image.label: Image

general_secondary_background_color.info: For best results, pick a color close to the primary background.
general_secondary_background_color.label: Secondary background

favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px
favicon.label: Favicon image

newsletter_discount_code.info: Optional. Automatically apply a [discount code](/admin/discounts) when someone signs up.
newsletter_discount_code.label: Discount code

newsletter_redirect_link.info: Optional. Redirect the customer to this page when they sign up.
newsletter_redirect_link.label: Signup redirect link

paragraph_newsletter.content: Emails added to the newsletter sign up form are added to your Shopify customer list. Using a Shopify App you can sync your customer list to your email marketing platform.

show_currency_codes_in_prices.label: Show currency codes in product prices
